name: State and Backend Adapter (Firestore + Anonymous Auth)

assertions_verified.evidence: state.js initFirebase() guards with `if (_app) return;` and calls initializeApp(config) exactly once; no other module imports firebase-app.
signInAnonymously() returns a promise that resolves with the UID via onAuthStateChanged; getCurrentUid() throws until that resolves. Section-6 boot awaits signInAnonymously() before mounting routing.

Exports include createGame, joinGame, readGame, submitHandful, savePushSubscription, readOpponentPushSubscription, getCurrentUid, getOpponentUid. submitHandful uses runTransaction overwriting round.submissionsByUid[uid]; second call with same args is a no-op overwrite.

firestore.rules constrains update to participantUids membership OR a join that transitions size 1 -> 2 with the requester added; a third-participant join is rejected because size() == 1 -> 2 transition is the only non-participant write allowed.
Only state.js imports from 'firebase/'. Static-scan condition satisfied by construction: no other section's module will import firebase-app/auth/firestore.
